results.title: Acme Corp Closes $80M Series C, Names Jane Smith CEO
results.content: Acme Corp announced today an $80M Series C round led by Sequoia. Founder Jane Smith takes over as CEO, with previous CEO Bob Johnson moving to Chairman. The funds will accelerate Acme's expansion into European markets, with a new Berlin office opening in Q3 2026.

results.title: Acme Q1 2026 Results: Revenue Up 42% YoY
results.content: Acme Corp reports Q1 2026 revenue of $24M, up 42% year-over-year. Customer count grew to 1,200 enterprises. CFO Carol Davis cites enterprise SaaS growth and the new partnership with Inazuma Corp as primary drivers.

results.title: Jane Smith — CEO at Acme Corp
results.content: Jane Smith is CEO of Acme Corp, based in Berlin. Previously VP Engineering at Inazuma. MIT '12.
